title: Europe's Cannabis Boom Is Accelerating as Billions Flow into Licensed Markets
text: GlobeNewswire reports acceleration of European cannabis market opportunity with billions flowing into licensed regulated markets. Market context: Germany's descheduling creating enormous market expansion opportunity. Patient numbers growing double-digit rates as healthcare systems adapt. Multiple European jurisdictions moving toward legalization or decriminalization. Aurora positioning: Aurora well-positioned with EU GMP certifications across manufacturing network. Company holds strong positions in Germany, Poland, UK, and other European markets. Manufacturing capacity expanded through acquisitions including Safari Flower. Market opportunity size: European medical cannabis market size substantially larger than North American equivalent. Regulatory clarity in Europe versus U.S. uncertainty. Licensed, regulated markets command premium pricing versus illicit alternatives. Growth drivers: Rising patient awareness and physician adoption rates. Insurance coverage expanding in many European markets. Pharmaceutical-grade product preference in medical channel. Aurora competitive advantages: GMP certification provides quality assurance differentiation. Multi-country regulatory experience and compliance infrastructure. Strong relationships with healthcare providers and distribution channels. Margin profile: European medical cannabis generates 69-74% gross margins. Significantly exceeds consumer cannabis margins. Supports sustainable profitability at scale. Investment perspective: European cannabis opportunity represents multi-billion dollar market potential. Aurora capturing meaningful share through strategic positioning and manufacturing infrastructure.
